hero.title: Proposal Writer
hero.description: Create structured client proposals from project context, proposal sections, drafts, and review history.

differences.title: Move from client opportunity to reviewable proposal
differences.description: Proposal Writer keeps proposal planning, content structure, draft writing, and review history in one workflow.

items.title: Project context
items.description: Capture the client, opportunity, budget range, due date, and status.

items.title: Structured sections
items.description: Write reusable proposal sections with ordering and readiness status.

items.title: Draft review
items.description: Prepare proposal drafts and track review or submission activity.

feel.title: A focused proposal workspace
feel.description: The app reduces blank-page effort by keeping client context, sections, drafts, and history close together.

items.title: Start with the client
items.description: Create the opportunity before writing detailed proposal content.

items.title: Build in sections
items.description: Organize the proposal into clear, editable parts.

items.title: Review the draft
items.description: Keep the final proposal body and activity history visible.

audiences.title: Who uses Proposal Writer
audiences.description: Useful for professionals preparing client-facing proposal drafts.

items.title: Freelancers
items.description: Prepare proposals for new client work.

items.title: Consultants
items.description: Structure scope, approach, and pricing discussions.

items.title: Small businesses
items.description: Create repeatable proposal drafts without losing client context.

resourceSection.title: Proposal-writing essentials
resourceSection.description: Keep the proposal purpose, structure, and review connected.

items.title: Client context
items.description: Clarify who the proposal is for and what it should achieve.

items.title: Section library
items.description: Draft scope, deliverables, pricing, and next-step sections.

groupedSection.title: Build a structured proposal
groupedSection.description: Move from opportunity details toward a reviewable client draft.

items.name: Client
items.description: Record who the proposal is for.

items.name: Opportunity
items.description: Describe the problem, scope, and budget range.

technicalSection.title: Designed for the Platform Foundation v1 era
technicalSection.description: Proposal Writer follows the shared Ansiversa mini-app architecture and approval checklist.
items: Protected project, section, draft, and history workflow.
Lightweight dashboard responses with detail endpoints for full text.

finalCta.title: Explore structured proposal writing
finalCta.description: Open Proposal Writer to create and refine client proposal drafts.
